body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
* Changes the return type of public functions (e.g., `insolation`, `daily_insolation`, and `solar_geometry`) to named tuples (from tuples)
* Corrects Milankovitch example in docs (closes #96)
* Increments minor release to 1.1 (and, yes, it's a breaking API change in principle, but since the API has not been integrated anywhere, nothing is actually breaking, so it's 1.1 not 2.0)

## To-do

- Proposed task
-->

- Solution implemented

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: Change insolation API to return named tuples; correct example in docs
